Always-on Hermes installer (zero-touch)

1) Double-click always-on-hermes-unsigned.pkg
2) Click through install prompts
3) Wait ~10-20 seconds after install completes

Expected behavior (no terminal required):
- Backend starts automatically
- Menubar companion starts automatically
- Native overlay starts automatically

If something fails, logs are now guaranteed in one of:
- /private/var/tmp/always-on-hermes-postinstall.log
- ~/Library/Logs/always-on-hermes-postinstall.log
